purpose: Audit and classify The Force Unleashed Campaign Guide feat parity, especially Force-power scoped feats, rage feats, contextual combat options, and Unleashed ability access.

sourceBasis.uploadedPdf: SAGA EDITION - Force Unleashed Campaign Guide.pdf
notes: This phase is feat parity and implementation-fit auditing only. It does not implement a full Unleashed Abilities subsystem.
Most Forceful feats are scoped to a named Force power activation or Force Point rider and must not become static Use the Force bonuses.
Rage feats belong to the rage/runtime state layer, not generic static skill math unless the caller supplies an active raging context.

expectedFeats.name: Advantageous Attack
expectedFeats.notes: Applies only against an enemy who has not acted yet; requires initiative/timing context.

expectedFeats.name: Advantageous Cover
expectedFeats.notes: Cover and area-attack context; not passive Reflex or damage math.

expectedFeats.name: Angled Throw
expectedFeats.notes: Thrown explosive option requiring terrain/bounce adjudication.

expectedFeats.name: Bad Feeling
expectedFeats.notes: Changes allowed action economy in surprise rounds, not ordinary speed/action totals.

expectedFeats.name: Blaster Barrage
expectedFeats.notes: Requires autofire area result and ally/team context.

expectedFeats.name: Controlled Rage
expectedFeats.notes: Free-action rage entry/end control; should stay in rage state rules.

expectedFeats.name: Crossfire
expectedFeats.notes: Requires missed ranged attack and soft-cover provider identification.

expectedFeats.name: Crush
expectedFeats.notes: Depends on successful Pin/grapple state.

expectedFeats.name: Cunning Attack
expectedFeats.notes: Applies only against flat-footed or Dex-denied targets.

expectedFeats.name: Focused Rage
expectedFeats.notes: Allows patience/concentration skills while raging at contextual penalty.

expectedFeats.name: Forceful Blast
expectedFeats.notes: Grenade/thermal detonator hit rider; not static damage.

expectedFeats.name: Forceful Grip
expectedFeats.notes: +2 applies only when activating Force Grip.

expectedFeats.name: Forceful Recovery
expectedFeats.notes: When catching second wind, return one expended Force power to suite; should hook into second wind/Force suite runtime.

expectedFeats.name: Forceful Saber Throw
expectedFeats.notes: +2 applies only when activating Saber Throw.

expectedFeats.name: Forceful Slam
expectedFeats.notes: +2 applies only when activating Force Slam.

expectedFeats.name: Forceful Strike
expectedFeats.notes: Spend Force Point with Force Stun to move target down CT; requires Force power resolution context.

expectedFeats.name: Forceful Stun
expectedFeats.notes: +2 applies only when activating Force Stun.

expectedFeats.name: Forceful Telekinesis
expectedFeats.notes: Spend Force Point with Move Object to move target down CT; requires Force power resolution context.

expectedFeats.name: Forceful Throw
expectedFeats.notes: +2 applies only when activating Move Object.

expectedFeats.name: Forceful Vitality
expectedFeats.notes: +2 Endurance and once-per-encounter failed Endurance reroll; should use skill/reroll metadata, not stale static math only.

expectedFeats.name: Forceful Weapon
expectedFeats.notes: +2 applies only when activating Battle Strike.

expectedFeats.name: Forceful Will
expectedFeats.notes: +2 Will only against mind-affecting effects plus once-per-encounter failed Will reroll.

expectedFeats.name: Improved Bantha Rush
expectedFeats.notes: Requires Bantha Rush action and Strength modifier context.

expectedFeats.name: Informer
expectedFeats.notes: Perception substitutes for Gather Information and halves favorable-condition time.

expectedFeats.name: Mighty Throw
expectedFeats.notes: Thrown-weapon attack calculation context only.

expectedFeats.name: Powerful Rage
expectedFeats.notes: +4 to Strength checks/Strength skills only while raging.

expectedFeats.name: Rapport
expectedFeats.notes: Increases bonus granted to an ally; not a self bonus.

expectedFeats.name: Strafe
expectedFeats.notes: Autofire pattern modification while moving; requires attack option UI.

expectedFeats.name: Swarm
expectedFeats.notes: Depends on adjacent allies to target; should not be sheet-static.

expectedFeats.name: Unleashed
expectedFeats.notes: Unlocks use of Unleashed abilities with Destiny Points and GM approval; full subsystem is out of scope.

expectedFeats.name: Unstoppable Force
expectedFeats.notes: +5 Fortitude/Will only against attacks/effects requiring Use the Force checks.

outOfScope.reason: The Unleashed feat can be metadata, but full Destiny Point fueled Unleashed Ability activation requires a separate ability/subsystem implementation.
Forceful power riders should wait for a proper Force power activation/result workflow rather than becoming static Use the Force modifiers.
Bantha Rush, autofire shape changes, soft cover followups, and adjacent ally bonuses need combat-option/result context.
Rage feats should use the existing rage state/context hooks and should not trigger a sheet rewrite in this phase.

recommendedNextWork: Add a Force power activation context bridge so Forceful Grip/Slam/Stun/Throw/Saber Throw/Weapon can apply their +2 only to the named power checks.
Add a second-wind hook for Forceful Recovery to restore one expended Force power by GM/player selection.
Add combat option/action-card candidates for Angled Throw, Strafe, Mighty Throw, and Improved Bantha Rush.
Treat Unleashed as a capability until a Destiny Point/Unleashed Ability subsystem exists.
